human_expression: Body, physical health, shelter, personal safety, material security
society_expression: Energy systems, water infrastructure, housing, transport, material resources
civilization_expression: Planetary resource base, energy regime, global infrastructure paradigm
examples: Power grids, housing, roads, space infrastructure
limitations: Becomes more abstract at civilization scale

human_expression: Personal health, nutrition, vitality, biological functioning
society_expression: Public health, food systems, agriculture, biodiversity, ecosystem health
civilization_expression: Planetary biosphere health, species survival, regenerative capacity
examples: Healthcare, farming, climate stability, ocean health

human_expression: Personal agency, competence, career, creativity, entrepreneurship
society_expression: Economic systems, labor markets, industry, innovation ecosystems
civilization_expression: Global economic paradigm, technological capacity, productive power
limitations: Power connotation may be misread as political

human_expression: Relationships, love, belonging, social identity, emotional bonds
society_expression: Social capital, cultural institutions, art, media, collective identity
civilization_expression: Global cultural exchange, shared narratives, intercultural dialogue
limitations: Culture is very broad at society level

society_expression: Governance systems, law, democracy, media, institutional coordination
civilization_expression: Global governance, international law, planetary coordination

human_expression: Learning, education, cognitive development, wisdom, foresight
society_expression: Education systems, science, research, universities, foresight
civilization_expression: Collective intelligence, scientific paradigms, planetary sensing
examples: STEM, IPCC, AI as collective cognition
limitations: Boundary with Consciousness needs careful definition

human_expression: Self-awareness, purpose, values, spiritual practice, ethical compass

civilization_expression: Civilizational purpose, planetary consciousness, cosmic orientation
